classification.rationale: Opening key takeaways for a 'What does Salesforce do?' explainer. Pure awareness-stage content for readers brand-new to Salesforce — they need orientation, not a pitch.

recommendations.match_rationale: After reading what Salesforce does, awareness-stage readers benefit from a forward-looking resource on agentic AI — the core of Salesforce's current strategy.
Free CRM offer is a low-friction next step for business leaders curious about what Salesforce does.
General Salesforce overview page aligns with the awareness intent of this section.

classification.rationale: Navigation/TOC section — no editorial content. No CTA appropriate here.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Navigation section with no editorial content — CTA would be premature and interruptive.

classification.rationale: Core definitional section explaining what Salesforce is. Awareness-stage readers learning the basics. High confidence — this is textbook awareness content.

recommendations.match_rationale: After reading what Salesforce does, an interactive demo is the perfect next step to see it in action — moves awareness reader toward consideration.
Free CRM is a compelling, low-barrier offer for a reader just learning what Salesforce does.
Agentic AI playbook extends the learning journey for readers curious about the future of Salesforce.

classification.rationale: Definitional explainer for Agentforce. Pure awareness — reader is learning what AI agents are within Salesforce.

recommendations.match_rationale: After learning what Agentforce is, an implementation e-book is a natural next step for curious business leaders.
Trailhead module on Agentforce aligns perfectly with awareness-stage readers wanting to learn more.
Agentic enterprise report deepens understanding of the Agentforce strategy for evaluating readers.

classification.rationale: Brief Slack explainer for readers new to the Salesforce ecosystem. Awareness-stage product introduction.

recommendations.match_rationale: Slack collaboration trial is a direct call-to-action for readers learning what Slack is.
Starter trial includes Slack, relevant for SMB readers exploring the full platform.
Extends learning for readers interested in how Slack fits into the agentic enterprise vision.

classification.rationale: This section moves from 'what' to 'how' — the reader is beginning to evaluate whether Salesforce fits their needs. Consideration stage with a CTA to see an interactive demo.

existing_cta.heading: Get hands on with our products
existing_cta.body: In this interactive Salesforce demo, you’ll explore real AI use cases and solutions built for agentic enterprises.

existing_cta_score.rationale: Interactive portfolio demo is a perfect match for a reader evaluating how Salesforce works — they want to see it in action, not just read about it.

recommendations.match_rationale: After understanding how Salesforce works, seeing an interactive demo is the natural next step.
Free CRM lets readers experience how it works firsthand.
Launchpad helps evaluating readers understand how to get started.

classification.rationale: Solution-oriented section for sales leaders learning how Salesforce addresses sales challenges. Consideration funnel — they're evaluating fit.

recommendations.match_rationale: Try-for-free CTA directly after reading about Salesforce for sales — perfect decision nudge for evaluating sales leaders.
Interactive demo lets sales leaders see Salesforce Sales in action.
Salesforce Sales overview page is a natural deeper dive for consideration-stage readers.

classification.rationale: Metrics-led section (33% CSAT improvement, 26% cost reduction) targeting service leaders evaluating Agentforce Service. Consideration stage with proof points.

recommendations.match_rationale: Explore Agentforce Service CTA directly aligns with readers evaluating Salesforce for customer service.
Try-for-free service CTA is a natural next step for SMB service leaders evaluating the platform.
Serviceblazer community invitation aligns with service leaders wanting peer connection.

classification.rationale: Solution-oriented overview of Salesforce Marketing for marketing leaders evaluating the platform.

recommendations.match_rationale: Find-out-for-free marketing CTA is ideal for marketing leaders evaluating Salesforce's marketing capabilities.

Marketing Cloud Spring release webinar extends learning for marketing leaders.

classification.rationale: Commerce overview for business leaders evaluating Salesforce's commerce capabilities.

recommendations.match_rationale: Commerce check-it-out CTA directly addresses readers learning about Salesforce commerce capabilities.

classification.rationale: IT-focused section showing Salesforce platform capabilities for IT leaders evaluating the platform.

existing_cta.heading: What’s your agentic AI strategy?
existing_cta.body: Our playbook is your free guide to becoming an agentic enterprise. Learn about use cases, deployment, and AI skills, and download interactive worksheets for your team.

issues: CTA targets general awareness audience but section is consideration-stage for IT leaders
Agentic AI playbook is broader than the IT-specific content in this section
existing_cta_score.rationale: The 'future starts now' agentic AI playbook is more of an awareness/inspiration CTA while the IT section targets evaluating IT leaders. Reasonable match but not ideal — an IT-specific CTA or demo would be stronger.

recommendations.match_rationale: Platform trial sign-up is ideal for IT leaders evaluating Salesforce's development capabilities.
Event monitoring Trailhead module directly aligns with IT security and admin audience.
DevSecOps guide is highly relevant for IT leaders thinking about platform security.

classification.rationale: SMB-specific section covering Salesforce Starter and free CRM options. High-intent consideration content for small business owners evaluating Salesforce.

recommendations.match_rationale: Free CRM is the perfect CTA for SMB owners who just read that Salesforce offers free tools for small businesses.
Starter trial directly matches the Starter Suite content discussed in this section.
See what's possible page aligns with SMB owners evaluating Salesforce for their needs.

classification.rationale: PepsiCo case study example — social proof content for evaluating business leaders. Consideration stage, showing real-world results.

classification.rationale: Brand reputation and heritage section — reinforces credibility for awareness-stage readers. Awareness CTA appropriate.

section_analyses.section_heading: Humans and agents driving customer success

classification.rationale: Closing inspirational section painting the vision of humans and AI agents working together. Long section (720w) that serves as a vision/aspiration narrative, moving reader toward decision.

recommendations.match_rationale: After the inspiring vision of humans+agents, the Agentforce growth guide is a perfect next step.
Interactive demo lets readers see the human+agent vision in practice.
Implementation e-book bridges the inspirational closing to concrete action.
